since_last: 75% of 84 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +4.07%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 75% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.66% · BTC +0.21% · Gold +1.40% · Nasdaq100 +1.23%. 75% of 84 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +4.07%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +4.07%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at +0.63%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: CEVA is the standout at +11.03%
cards.body: Leaders: CEVA +11.03%, VRT +7.62%, INOD +7.40%, ANET +7.34%, AMD +7.17%. Laggards: AVAV -6.28%, SPCX -3.82%, UPST -2.50%, OKLO -2.30%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -3.82% at $155.81
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -3.82% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
